title: HOME REUNIFICATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: CITY OF PORTLAND HOME REUNIFICATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a family reunification program that offers one-time transportation assistance to a safe, stable housing destination outside the City of Portland. 1120 SW 5th Avenue Suite 114 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Homeless individuals and families with children age 18 and younger who have access to safe, stable housing outside the City of Portland Hours: 7 days per week 7am-8pm Email 311 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone 311 Alternate (503) 823-4000 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call 311 to complete the interest form or for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Portland Services: Return to Point of Origin Return to Point of Origin * Families with Children Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - 311 CITY AND COUNTY INFORMATION AND REFERRAL COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - OFFICE OF COMMUNITY AND CIVIC LIFE HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESSNESS AND URBAN CAMPING IMPACT REDUCTION PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CITY OF PORTLAND STREET OUTREACH REQUEST PROGRAM LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - ONE POINT OF CONTACT UNSANCTIONED CAMPSITE REPORTING LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - ROSE CITY SELF DEFENSE MATERIAL GOODS - COOLING PORTLAND PCEF-FUNDED CLIMATE RESILIENCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF PORTLAND
